subject: Important: Your Appointment on 2025-12-08 at 16:00
body:
Dear Maria Rodriguez,

I hope you’re continuing to feel better as you recover from your knee surgery. I’m reaching out to let you know that Sarah Johnson, your original physical therapist, is out sick and will be unable to see patients on December 8. We want to ensure your care continues seamlessly, so we’ve scheduled you with Anna Martinez, another member of our Orthopedic Physical Therapy team at Metro PT Downtown.

Anna is a highly experienced therapist who specializes in post-surgical knee rehabilitation. She works closely with Sarah and will be fully up to speed on your treatment plan to keep your recovery on track and comfortable.

If you have any concerns or would like to discuss your upcoming visit, please don’t hesitate to contact us at Metro Physical Therapy, (555) 123-4567. We’re here to make sure everything goes smoothly for you.

Warm regards,  
Metro Physical Therapy Team

subject: Important: Your Appointment on 2025-12-09 at 14:00
body:
Dear John,  

I hope you’re doing well today. I wanted to reach out regarding your upcoming appointment for lower back pain scheduled on December 9 at 2:00 PM with Sarah Johnson. Unfortunately, Sarah is out sick and won’t be available that day.  

To ensure you continue receiving the care you need, we’ve arranged for you to see Anna Martinez at Metro PT Downtown instead. Anna is a highly experienced orthopedic physical therapist who specializes in treating back and spine conditions, and she works closely with Sarah’s team to provide seamless continuity of care.  

We understand that changes like this can be inconvenient, and we truly appreciate your understanding. Anna is looking forward to meeting you and helping you stay on track with your recovery.  

If you have any questions or need to adjust the new appointment, please don’t hesitate to contact us at Metro Physical Therapy, (555) 123-4567.  

Warm regards,  
Metro Physical Therapy Team

subject: Important: Your Appointment on 2025-12-10 at 09:00
body:
Dear Maria,  

I hope you’re continuing to feel stronger after your knee surgery. I’m writing to let you know that Sarah Johnson, your physical therapist, is unfortunately out sick and won’t be available for your upcoming appointment on December 10 at 9:00 a.m.  

To make sure your care stays on track, we’ve rescheduled you with Anna Martinez at the same time and location—Metro PT Downtown. Anna is a licensed orthopedic physical therapist with extensive experience in post-surgical knee rehabilitation. She works closely with Sarah and is fully up to date on your treatment plan, so your session will continue seamlessly.  

We appreciate your understanding and flexibility. If you have any questions or need to adjust anything, please don’t hesitate to contact us at Metro Physical Therapy, (555) 123-4567.  

Warm regards,  
Metro Physical Therapy Team

subject: Important: Your Appointment on 2025-12-10 at 10:00
body:
Dear John,  

I hope you’re doing well and finding some comfort as you manage your lower back pain. I’m reaching out regarding your upcoming appointment originally scheduled for December 10 at 10:00 with Sarah Johnson. Unfortunately, Sarah is out sick and won’t be able to see patients that day.  

We’ve rescheduled your visit with Anna Martinez, one of our experienced orthopedic physical therapists at Metro PT Downtown. Anna specializes in spine and musculoskeletal care and works closely with Sarah’s team, so you’ll be in very capable hands. She’ll review your treatment plan to ensure continuity and keep your progress on track.  

Thank you for your understanding and flexibility, John. We truly appreciate it and look forward to helping you feel better soon. If you have any questions or need to discuss any details, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us at Metro Physical Therapy, (555) 123-4567.  

Warm regards,  
Metro PT Team

subject: Important: Your Appointment on 2025-12-10 at 09:00
body:
Dear Mr. Miller,  

I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to reach out regarding your upcoming appointment originally scheduled for December 10 at 9:00 AM with Michael Lee. Unfortunately, Michael is out sick and will be unable to see patients that day.  

To ensure your care continues smoothly, we’ve arranged for you to meet with Sarah Johnson, our Orthopedic Physical Therapy specialist, at Metro PT Downtown. Sarah has extensive experience helping patients manage knee arthritis and improve mobility, and she’s looking forward to supporting your treatment plan.  

Thank you for your understanding and flexibility. If you have any questions or would like to discuss your care before the appointment, please don’t hesitate to contact us at Metro Physical Therapy, (555) 123-4567.  

Warm regards,  
Metro Physical Therapy Team
